steps.title: Spot the participial phrase
steps.content: The words after the blank – allowing only some light to pass through – form a participial phrase that describes krotite. A participial phrase must be set off from the noun it modifies by a comma.

Choice C inserts a comma after transparent, giving 'transparent, allowing' and correctly setting off the participial phrase. The other three either lack the required comma, use 'and' to create a faulty coordination, or run the words together without punctuation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
steps.title: Apply the comma rule
